title: Revamped Floating Islands
description: Datapack that creates Floating Island worlds based on the old preset, with all biomes and structures. Additionally featuring floating oceans and rivers.
body:
# Revamped Floating Islands  
Revamped Floating Islands is a datapack that seeks to build upon the vanilla floating islands world generation that existed before 1.18. Not only do all biomes and structures exist, but floating rivers and oceans also generate, along with floating bodies of water in all other biomes (all done with aquifers). There are other smaller tweaks as well meant to improve the quality of the vanilla floating islands.

### Floating Nether
I've also added a sister-pack that makes the nether become floating islands as well! Check out [Nether Floating Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nether-floating-islands). **Currently Pending Approval**

## FAQ
1. "Is there any way to stop structures from generating in the void?"
   - Check out my [No Void Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-void-structures) mod.
2. "Is this compatible with this Datapack / Mod?"
   - If it changes terrain, no. If it adds biomes, it will be partially compatible (biomes may look weird depending on how they are implemented).


### Check out my new and improved floating island pack, [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands)
